A portion of the Introduction message

...Papyrus could handle almost anything, from verbal abuse to physical punishments- to the point of nearly dusting on several occasions. But punishing him by taking his precious cigarettes and the little cash he thought he smartly hid throughout the house? It was maddening!

Even the alcohol was taken!

This was the worst punishment of all. And as a result, he was in a pissy mood. It's an inevitability. It hadn't even been that long, but he already begun experiencing tremors in his hands and further struggles with sleep, he was already an insomniac so the little sleep he got was now next to nothing. He was half-tempted to give Sans grief for it, but he may go longer without his precious indulgences, so he wouldn't...

Please don't outright copy anything from my bot. I tried writing the bot in anypov. Bot is untested. But if anything breaks I'll try and edit it up further! Please be patient, thank you.

Additionally, this isn't accurate to Fellswap, but I tried to keep him antagonistic combined with heavily pessimistic. User was requested to be human, but I still want to keep it ambiguous for those wanting to be a monster! :3
